questions.q: Which country played in the opening match of the 2026 World Cup?
Three countries are co-hosting the 2026 World Cup. Which three?
Mexico opened the 2026 World Cup against which nation?
Who are the reigning world champions heading into 2026?
Which superstar captained Argentina to the 2022 World Cup title?

FIFA made Haiti change their shirt just before the tournament because the design showed what kind of image?
How many teams are at the 2026 World Cup, the most ever?
Scotland are back at the World Cup after decades away. Famously, they have never managed to do what?
options: Qualify two tournaments in a row

questions.q: Where will the 2026 World Cup final be played, just outside New York?
Like the Azteca, MetLife Stadium has its name hidden by FIFA for the final. Why?
options: FIFA bans sponsor names at the World Cup
The stadium is still under construction
A legal dispute over the name
It is kept secret for security

questions.q: Which country has won the most World Cups, with five titles?
Which legend is the only player to win the World Cup three times?
Argentina beat which country on penalties in the 2022 World Cup final?
Players often struggle in Mexico City because its stadium sits at an extreme...?

Canada's official World Cup mascot, Maple, is which animal?

After all those red cards, how many players did South Africa finish the opening match with?
Who scored the very first goal of the 2026 World Cup, inside ten minutes of the opener?
Which veteran striker scored Mexico's second goal in the 2-0 win over South Africa?
Hosts the USA hammered Paraguay 4-1 in their opener. How many goals did the USA score?
Co-hosts Canada were held to a draw by Bosnia and Herzegovina in their first game. What was the score?

Who are the reigning world champions heading into the 2026 World Cup?

Qatar's late equaliser against Switzerland was scored by which experienced campaigner?
Scotland's win over Haiti was their first at a World Cup since 1990. Which unwanted World Cup record do they hold?
options: Most appearances without ever reaching the knockout stage
Most red cards at a single World Cup

questions.q: World Cup debutants held the European champions to a goalless draw in the group stage. Which nation pulled off the shock?
Cabo Verde's man of the match against Spain was their 40-year-old goalkeeper. By what name is he known?
Vozinha's clean sheet made him the third-oldest goalkeeper to keep one in a men's World Cup match. He trails only which two greats?
Spain laid siege to the Cabo Verde goal without reward. Roughly how many shots did they register across the 90 minutes?
Spain arrived in the United States as the reigning champions of which competition?

Curacao are the smallest nation by population ever to reach a men's World Cup. Whose record did they take?

options: They scored their first ever World Cup goal
They became the smallest nation to win a point
They conceded the fastest goal in tournament history

questions.q: Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 for their first World Cup win since which year?

Which side recovered from conceding the opening goal to thrash World Cup debutants Curacao 7-1?
Who were the reigning world champions going into the 2026 World Cup?

Haaland dragged Norway to the finals as the leading scorer of European qualifying, eight clear of anyone else. How many did he score in the campaign?
Mbappe broke Just Fontaine's France World Cup record, a tally of 13 goals set at a single tournament. In which year did Fontaine score them?
Messi's treble against Algeria made him both the youngest and oldest goalscorer in Argentina's World Cup history. In which tournament did an 18-year-old Messi score his first World Cup goal?
Lionel Messi opened his sixth World Cup with his first-ever hat-trick at the tournament. Which side did Argentina beat 3-0 to begin their title defence?
Argentina arrived in 2026 as defending champions. Where did they lift the trophy in 2022?
Kylian Mbappe became which nation's all-time leading scorer during their opening 3-1 win over Senegal?
Messi's treble carried him to 16 World Cup goals, level with the tournament's all-time leading scorer. Who holds that record alongside him?
Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo share a new distinction in 2026. They are the first players ever to do what?
options: Appear at six different World Cups
Score at six different World Cups
Captain a side at six World Cups

questions.q: Mbappe's double against Senegal took him past Olivier Giroud at the top of France's scoring chart. What was his new national tally?
Erling Haaland scored twice on his long-awaited World Cup debut in a 4-1 Norway win. Who were the opponents, themselves back on the biggest stage after a 40-year wait?

Ronaldo's sixth World Cup opened with a frustrating 1-1 draw. Which side earned their first-ever World Cup point against Portugal?
By starting against DR Congo at 41 years old, Ronaldo set which World Cup record?
options: Oldest outfield player to start a World Cup match
Oldest goalscorer in World Cup history
Oldest captain at a World Cup
Oldest player ever to appear at a World Cup

questions.q: Harry Kane's opener against Croatia was his 10th World Cup goal, drawing him level with England's tournament record holder. Who is that?
Mbappe broke the France record in spectacular fashion against Senegal. How did the milestone goal arrive?
options: A long-range strike deep in stoppage time

questions.q: Cape Verde's clean sheet against Spain owed much to a veteran goalkeeper who made a string of saves. Roughly how old is their hero, Vozinha?

Brazil's 3-0 win sent which nation home as the first team eliminated from World Cup 2026?
Morocco beat Scotland in Boston to take control of their group. What was the final score?
Who scored after just 70 seconds — one of the quickest goals of the 2026 World Cup — to settle the Scotland game?

The Brazil v Haiti and Scotland v Morocco fixtures were both played in the same group. Which one?

options: Captain Morocco at a World Cup
Score in three different World Cups

questions.q: Paraguay held on to beat Turkiye with ten men after a first-half red card to which forward?

From which confederation did Curacao, a Caribbean island side, qualify for the World Cup?
Germany came from behind to win 2-1 in Toronto. Which side did they beat?
Germany's comeback was driven by a substitute who scored twice after coming on around the hour mark. Who was it?

options: He was shown a yellow card

questions.q: Messi went level with Klose on 16 World Cup goals thanks to what feat in Argentina's tournament opener against Algeria?

At that stage of the 2026 World Cup, who led the Golden Boot race with five goals, one clear of Mbappe and Haaland?

What was the final scoreline as France beat Iraq in that fixture?

At 38, Messi's hat-trick against Algeria carried an added distinction: he became the oldest player ever to do what at a World Cup?
options: Captain a side in the final
Be named player of the match

questions.q: Brazil sealed top spot in Group C with a 3-0 win over which side, leaving the beaten team's World Cup hopes hanging by a thread?
Which Real Madrid forward scored both of Brazil's first two goals in the 3-0 win over Scotland?
Who came off the Brazil bench against Scotland to make his first appearance for the national team in roughly three years?

options: Keep three clean sheets in a group

questions.q: Coming off the bench against Czechia, 40-year-old Guillermo Ochoa featured at his sixth World Cup, joining which two players as the only men to appear at six?

France beat Norway 4-1 in Boston to finish their group with three wins from three. Who scored a first-half hat-trick?
Norway rotated heavily and left one striker on the bench against France, despite the crowd chanting his name. Who was it?
Their win over Norway confirmed France as winners of which group?

Who scored Norway's only goal against France, briefly pulling it back to 2-1?

Belgium hammered New Zealand 5-1 to win their group. Which veteran playmaker was among the scorers?
Belgium's rout took top spot in Group G on goal difference. Which side went through as runners-up?
Iran thought they had snatched a stoppage-time winner against Egypt, only for the goal to be chalked off after a VAR review. Why?
options: The ball had gone out of play

questions.q: Spain edged top spot in Group H with a 1-0 win over which South American side?

Who enter the knockout rounds as reigning world champions?

Ecuador beat Germany 2-1 on the final group day to sneak through as a best third-placed side. Despite the defeat, Germany still managed what?
options: Failed to score in the group

As the knockout rounds get going, who are the reigning world champions chasing back-to-back titles?
This is the first World Cup to stage a Round of 32, a consequence of the field expanding to how many teams?
Canada beat South Africa 1-0 in the opening Round of 32 tie. Who struck deep in stoppage time to win it?

Five-time world champions Brazil came from behind to win 2-1 in the last 32. Which nation did they knock out?

options: An own goal in extra time

questions.q: Who scored the 92nd-minute winner that sent Canada past South Africa and into the last 16?
Trailing Japan at half-time, Brazil turned it around late. Who scored their stoppage-time winner?

Germany's exit made them the first of the tournament's traditional heavyweights to fall. At which stage were they knocked out?
In the Round of 32, France faced which Nordic side?

Which striker struck a late winner to send Norway past Ivory Coast and into the last 16?
France eased past Sweden 3-0 in the Round of 32, with which forward scoring twice?
Lionel Messi is now the outright all-time leading goalscorer in World Cup history. Which player did he overtake at the top of the list?
The all-time World Cup goals record that Messi has now surpassed had stood at how many goals?
Messi and which other forward jointly lead the 2026 Golden Boot race, each on six goals?
Morocco knocked the Netherlands out on penalties. Which goalkeeper made the decisive save in the shootout?
Paraguay's shootout win in the Round of 32 was hailed as a great upset — it eliminated which four-time World Cup winners?
Norway's win over Ivory Coast was a landmark for the nation because it was their first-ever World Cup...?
Brazil booked a last-16 tie with Norway by winning their Round of 32 match 2-1 against whom?
Brazil's Ronaldo sits fourth on the all-time World Cup scoring list, just behind Klose. How many World Cup goals did he score in his career?
Whose header deep in stoppage time forced extra time for Morocco against the Netherlands, before the shootout?
Antonio Nusa opened the scoring for Norway against Ivory Coast, teed up by which captain and playmaker?
Who scored Germany's equaliser against Paraguay to force extra time, before the fatal shootout?
Which winger supplied two assists as France dismantled Sweden 3-0 to reach the last 16?
Harry Kane struck twice late on to rescue England in a 2-1 comeback win over which nation in the Round of 32?
Belgium came from 2-0 down to win 3-2 after extra time against which side in the Round of 32?
The United States reached the Round of 16 with a 2-0 win over which nation?
England's win over DR Congo set up a Round of 16 tie with which host nation, to be played at the Azteca?
Who converted the extra-time penalty that completed Belgium's comeback win over Senegal?
Which substitute pulled a goal back late on to ignite Belgium's fightback against Senegal?
Which forward scored the USA's opener against Bosnia before being sent off in the second half?
The USA's victory was their first World Cup win over a European side since beating which nation in the 2002 opener?
Belgium's reward for beating Senegal is a Round of 16 meeting with which nation?
Which manager oversaw England's comeback win over DR Congo?
Youri Tielemans' penalty against Senegal, timed at 124 minutes and 44 seconds, set what World Cup record?
options: The latest goal ever scored in a World Cup match
The fastest penalty in a World Cup match
The first successful extra-time penalty in a shootout
The latest red card in a World Cup match

questions.q: DR Congo stunned England with a seventh-minute opener in Atlanta. Which forward scored it?
Senegal led Belgium 2-0 through Habib Diarra and which winger before the collapse?
Kane's double against DR Congo took his tally for this World Cup to how many goals, keeping him in the Golden Boot race?
Malik Tillman's strike against Bosnia was the USA's first World Cup goal direct from a free kick since which player scored against Switzerland in 1994?
Cristiano Ronaldo converted a penalty as Portugal edged which nation 2-1 in the Round of 32?
Erling Haaland struck the decisive goal as which country won a World Cup knockout match for the first time in its history?
Which co-host nation reached the last 16, seeing off South Africa 1-0 with a stoppage-time winner?
Germany were knocked out in the Round of 32, losing a penalty shootout to which South American side?
The Netherlands were also dumped out on penalties in the last 32. Who beat them?
Who scored twice as Spain brushed aside Austria 3-0 in the Round of 32?
The Round of 32 marked the World Cup farewell of which 40-year-old midfielder, beaten by Portugal in his final tournament?
Which World Cup debutants reached the knockout stage as the smallest nation ever to do so, drawing all three group games before meeting Argentina?
Gabriel Martinelli's stoppage-time strike sent Brazil past which side in the Round of 32?
Norway's reward for reaching the last 16 is a tie with Brazil, reviving memories of Norway's famous World Cup win over the Selecao in which year?
Spain's win over Austria was their first World Cup knockout victory since which year?
Who put Paraguay ahead against Germany before they completed their shootout upset?
Whose stoppage-time header settled Portugal's 2-1 win over Croatia?
England edged DR Congo 2-1, the Central Africans' first World Cup since they competed as Zaire in which year?
Alongside Haaland, which winger scored for Norway in their 2-1 win over Ivory Coast?
The standout tie of the last 16 pits two Iberian neighbours against one another. Which pair?
Who survived a huge scare from World Cup debutants Cape Verde, winning 3-2 after extra time to reach the last 16?
Which co-host nation face Belgium in the Round of 16?
England's Round of 16 opponents are which co-host nation?
France, chasing back-to-back finals, face which South American side that stunned Germany on penalties?
Morocco, who knocked out the Netherlands on penalties, meet which co-host in the last 16?
Egypt reached the knockout stage for the first time in their history, edging Australia 1-1 by what means?
Who scored the only goal as Colombia beat Ghana 1-0 to set up a last-16 meeting with Switzerland?
Lionel Messi's early strike against Cape Verde moved him one goal clear at the top of the 2026 Golden Boot race, ahead of which rival?
Erling Haaland's Norway, in their first World Cup since 1998, face which five-time champions in the last 16?
Argentina's decisive goal against Cape Verde, in the 111th minute, came off a header from which centre-back before deflecting in?
Which Cape Verde midfielder cancelled out Messi's opener to level the tie at 1-1?
Portugal v Spain revives their 2010 last-16 meeting, won 1-0 by Spain on the way to the title. Who scored the only goal that day?
The 2026 World Cup is only Egypt's fourth. Before this tournament, when did they last appear at the finals?
Cape Verde became the smallest nation ever to reach a World Cup knockout stage. Roughly what is their population?
In which year did England win their one and only FIFA World Cup?
What was the final score when England beat West Germany in the 1966 World Cup Final at Wembley?
Geoff Hurst scored the only hat-trick in World Cup Final history in 1966. Who scored England's other goal in that final?
Which England manager led the Three Lions to their 1966 World Cup triumph?
England reached the World Cup semi-finals in 1990, losing to which country on penalties?
Paul Gascoigne was in tears during the 1990 semi-final after receiving a yellow card. Why did the booking devastate him in that moment?
options: It meant he would have been suspended for the final if England had won
It was his second yellow of the tournament, ending his World Cup
It was the harshest booking he had ever received in his career
He had promised his manager he would stay disciplined all tournament

questions.q: Which England striker won the Golden Boot at the 1986 World Cup in Mexico with six goals?
David Beckham was sent off for a kick at Diego Simeone at the 1998 World Cup, leaving England to play most of the match with ten men. Which country were England playing?
In the 2010 World Cup, Frank Lampard's shot clearly crossed the goal line but was not awarded. Which country were England playing when it happened?
Harry Kane won the 2018 World Cup Golden Boot with six goals, helping England reach the semi-finals. Which manager led England to that campaign?
England actually went behind in the 1966 World Cup Final before coming back to win 4-2. Which West German player opened the scoring?
How many times have England failed to qualify for the FIFA World Cup finals?
England have been knocked out of the World Cup on penalties on three separate occasions. Which answer correctly names all three opponents?
Geoff Hurst's controversial second goal in the 1966 Final — the shot that hit the crossbar and bounced on the line — was awarded by a linesman from which country?
England's 1990 World Cup shootout exit against West Germany remains one of the defining moments of English football. Which two players missed the decisive penalties?
Morocco knocked out which co-host nation 3-0 to reach the World Cup quarter-finals?
Who converted the 70th-minute penalty that sent France past Paraguay and into the last eight?
Morocco, who reached the last eight again in 2026, are known by which nickname?
Which midfielder scored twice as Morocco beat Canada, striking in the 50th and 82nd minutes?
By reaching the last eight in 2026, Morocco became the first African nation to do what?
options: Reach the World Cup quarter-finals more than once
Win a World Cup knockout match
Qualify for four World Cups in a row

questions.q: Morocco's deep run echoes 2022, when they became the first African team to achieve what?
options: Keep a clean sheet in a World Cup final
Score in a World Cup final

questions.q: Mbappe's penalty took him to seven goals for the tournament, drawing him level at the top of the scoring charts with which player?
The two July 4 winners were paired together in the last eight. Who will France face in the quarter-final?
France, the 2018 world champions, went all the way to the final again in 2022 but lost to whom?
Paraguay had reached the last 16 by stunning which heavyweight on penalties in the previous round?
After his goal against Cape Verde, Lionel Messi holds the all-time record for most goals at World Cup finals. How many?
Both Messi and Mbappe have now passed which German striker, the previous all-time World Cup top scorer on 16 goals?
France's decisive penalty came after which forward was brought down in the box by Paraguay's Diego Gomez?
Ounahi's opener against Canada was teed up by a set-piece from which Morocco captain and full-back?
Mbappe's strike also made him the record-holder for most goals in World Cup knockout-stage matches. How many has he now scored in the knockouts?
Which nation knocked five-time champions Brazil out of the 2026 World Cup in the round of 16?
Who scored twice to complete Norway's stunning victory over Brazil?
England reached the quarter-finals by winning 3-2 against which nation at the Estadio Azteca?
Beating Brazil took Norway into the first World Cup quarter-final in their history. Which stage had been their previous best?
Haaland's double against Brazil took his tournament tally to how many goals, joining the leaders at the top of the scoring charts?
Which Brazil forward converted a stoppage-time consolation penalty in the defeat to Norway?
Which England midfielder struck twice to put his side 2-0 up against Mexico?
England restored their lead against Mexico from the penalty spot in the second half through which captain?
England saw out the win over Mexico a man light after which defender was shown a straight red card?
Victory over Mexico set up an England quarter-final against which surprise package of the last eight?
Brazil's round-of-16 defeat was their earliest exit from a World Cup since which year?
Which Brazil midfielder had a first-half penalty saved by Norway goalkeeper Orjan Nyland?
Which Mexico striker pulled a goal back from the penalty spot to make it 3-2 against England?
This was Norway's first World Cup since 1998, the tournament where they also beat Brazil 2-1 in the group stage. Brazil went into that 1998 meeting as the reigning what?
Which Norway substitute delivered the cross for Haaland's opening goal against Brazil?
